title: rosa iberica var. anatolica
intro: Rosa iberica var. anatolica, also known as the Anatolian rose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rosa genus and native to the Anatolian region of Turkey. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa iberica var. anatolica include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
